word: G361 - ἀναμάρτητος - anamártētos - an-am-ar'-tay-tos - That is without sin

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: That is without sin
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
sinless, both one who has not sinned, and one who cannot sin
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1 (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G264; sinless: - that is without sin.
